title: Technician (Process Engineering) – MNC, Medical Device Facility | $3.1K #HTJ
description:
Driven by the passion to improve quality of people’s lives, continues to grow as market leader in the hearing aid industry. With our commitment to increase penetration in an underserved hearing care market, we want to accelerate our business transformation in order to reach more people, more effectively.


What you will do

  • Perform test machine setup, validation, diagnosis of issues encountered and provide resolution of the issue
  • Assist in preventive maintenance (PM) and calibration of test equipment, ensuring all activities are properly documented
  • Support software verification and validation activities
  • Perform weekly performance report,
  • Troubleshoot and analyze failure product (external/internal) and works with Engineers on the corrective and preventive action
  • Streamlining of process as part of process improvement including documentation creation and update
  • Support data collection/ analysis for trial run and process/ product improvement
  • Conduct training based on identified test methodology/ procedure
  • Handle purchasing, adjustment and shipment for global site support
  • Inventory/ lab maintenance, 5S and EHS
  • Support gas phase coating process
  • Perform other/ ad hoc topic assigned

Requirements:

  • Min NITEC in any engineering courses
  • Experienced in manufacturing environments
  • Medical manufacturing industrial experience is preferable (Not compulsory)
  • Basic knowledge of E&E, able to understand schematic drawing

Interested candidates, please send your resume to jalenetan@recruitexpress.com.sg

Jalene Tan
Outsourced Team
Recruit Express Pte Ltd, EA License No.: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
